==Biography==
Chuuper started out primarily playing solo queue during the first season of ''League of Legends''. This lasted until the summer of 2012 when he formed a team known as [[Chuuper's Troopers]]. After a defeat from [[Team Dynamic]], the team disbanded. Chuuper joined [[The Brunch Club]] after being approached by [[Lautemortis]]. The team qualified for the [[NA LCS 2013 Spring]] and was acquired by [[compLexity Gaming]]. The team performed poorly, and Chuuper was benched mid-split, being replaced by [[pr0lly]]. After being benched, Chuuper swapped roles from mid to bot and returned to the starting lineup after [[brunch Ü]] left. However, the team was relegated during the [[NA LCS 2013 Summer Promotion]] and lost its NA LCS slot. After playing in a few minor tournaments, compLexity and Chuuper tried to requalify for the NA LCS during the [[NA LCS 2014 Spring Promotion]], but failed. Afterward, Chuuper left the team and quietly retired from professional play.

== Trivia ==
* Known for making in-game mistakes, commonly referred to as "Chuuper's Bloopers."
